description: Accounts of a druggist. In Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Items include realgar (="red arsenic," zirnīkh aḥmar), red lead (sīlqūn), ground myrtle (marsīn maṭḥūn), and white tragacanth (kathīrā bayḍā).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
